title: Chapter 71
text: CONTACT ME Shantel’s Facebook Spoiler Room . Please note that I have one spoiler room for all books, and you may come across spoilers from book(s) you have not had the chance to read yet. You must answer both questions in order to be approved. https://www.facebook.com/groups/246657056669108/ Join Shantel Tessier’s mailing list for exclusive material and giveaways: https://bit.ly/37c1fEM Facebook Reader group Goodreads Instagram Website Facebook page TikTok If you would like to join the street team or review team, please send all inquiries to shanteltessierassistant@gmail.com
